title: Better Balanced Shields
description: Mod which makes Minecraft shields a little more (customizably) balanced
body:
# Better Balanced Shields

Mod which makes shields:

- Deflect arrows, splash potions (buff and debuff) (configurable)
- Only absorb 25% of melee damage (configurable)
- Reflect 0% of melee damage (configurable)
- (not implemented) Ignore lingering potion effect (inc. dragon breath) while shield is up (configurable)
- (configurable)
